enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nadhi Vellam'?

The song conveys themes of longing and emotional connection, reflecting the protagonist's feelings towards their beloved.

How does 'Nadhi Vellam' fit into the plot of Thanga Meengal?

This song plays a crucial role in illustrating the emotional struggles of the characters, enhancing the narrative of the film.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Nadhi Vellam'?

The song is sung by Rahul Nambiar and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was 'Nadhi Vellam' released?

'Nadhi Vellam' was released on September 7, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nadhi Vellam, the protagonist expresses deep feelings of longing and nostalgia, beautifully encapsulated through Rahul Nambiar's emotive singing. The song serves as a poignant reflection of love and loss, resonating with anyone who has experienced heartache. With Yuvan's melodic composition and Na Muthukumar's heartfelt lyrics, the track evokes a sense of yearning that lingers long after the music fades. It is a perfect blend of melody and emotion, making it a memorable piece in the Thanga Meengal soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nadhi Vellam from the Thanga Meengal soundtrack beautifully captures the essence of longing and nostalgia. With Rahul Nambiar's soulful vocals and Yuvan's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the emotional depth and lyrical brilliance that makes this track a standout in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: On the river water, my little fish, you are sleeping, golden thoughts flow in my heart. In the twilight of the past, my dear, the sweet words will call you again.
The tears from my eyes search for your face, hiding the sight of the rain.
A rain has come in my heart, before the storms, lightning fell and the forest was shaken.
On the river water, my little fish, you are sleeping, golden thoughts flow in my heart. In the twilight of the past, my dear, the sweet words will call you again.
Like a cloud that has settled, this life is moving forward, in the path of the wind, we are blending, even in the doorway of the festival, colors are being spread.
My life, I separated from you, immediately I became two, my body lives there, you are my life there.
On the river water, my little fish, you are sleeping, golden thoughts flow in my heart. In the twilight of the past, my dear, the sweet words will call you again.
If a flower falls, many will run, if it blooms, life will not be there, even in that situation, the struggles will become a reality.
My life, I separated from you, immediately I became two, my body lives there, you are my life there.
On the river water, my little fish, you are sleeping, golden thoughts flow in my heart. In the twilight of the past, my dear, the sweet words will call you again.
